message:
Merge PR #2935: fix: add missing Handler patrol to lifecycle defaults test

Adds the Handler field to TestEnsureLifecycleDefaults_FullyConfigured so
the test covers the full patrol config.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2935
